summary: Iteration 4: Tested all new features - WASD keyup fix, Biodiversity Catalog panel, Settings panel, WCAG colorblind modes, key remapping, glossary tooltips. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and passing: title→hub navigation, C key catalog, S key settings, 9 species cards, STAGHORN/SHARK/WHALE present, glossary tooltip on hover, remap button shows PRESS KEY, DEUTERANOPIA cb-active class, RESET TO DEFAULTS, ESC closes panels, equipment bay via E key. WASD keyup fix confirmed (key released properly). Hub canvas testid=hub-canvas working.
passed_tests: Title screen loads with BEGIN MISSION button
C key opens catalog-panel from hub
STAGHORN CORAL, REEF SHARK, BLUE WHALE present in catalog
Clicking species card shows detail pane
All 6 keybinding rows present (SWIM LEFT/RIGHT/UP, GUARDIAN ABILITY, PAUSE, TOGGLE SOUND)
All 4 colorblind modes present (NORMAL, DEUTERANOPIA, PROTANOPIA, HIGH CONTRAST)
remap-left button shows PRESS KEY prompt when clicked
DEUTERANOPIA marks cb-active class when clicked
WASD D key pressed and released without sticking
Equipment panel opens via E key near equipment bay zone
